name: Terry Sullivan, MarcoRubio.com
subject: Happy Birthday Marco!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42244115:17289400386:m:1:1349778030:CC08402FCD8B71E2952AC97762AB8D54:r)
---
Peter, It's Marco's birthday today and the campaign is trying to surprise him by raising $44,000 (in honor of his 44th birthday). Will you help us out by donating now and sharing your birthday message for Marco? [_**Click here.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42244115:17289400386:m:1:1349778030:CC08402FCD8B71E2952AC97762AB8D54:r) Your support and encouragement are so important to Marco in the early stages of our campaign. And this birthday surprise would be a **huge boost** to the monthly fundraising goal. I speak for the whole team when I say we're proud of Marco and the hard work he's putting in to make this campaign about ensuring the American Dream exists for generations to come. **[_Please show your support, make a donation and leave your birthday message for Marco here._](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42244115:17289400386:m:1:1349778030:CC08402FCD8B71E2952AC97762AB8D54:r)** Thank you,
Terry Sullivan
Campaign Manager Marco Rubio for President

name: Senator Lindsey Graham
subject: FWD: 5 Days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Security Through Strength
body:
Friend -

I have some big news, so I didn't want you to miss it.

In less than 5 days, I will share with you my final decision for 2016. **But before I make my announcement, I am counting on your support before MIDNIGHT on May 31th**.

[**Will you chip in $25 or even $10 before I make my announcement?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28047480:26946800489:m:1:877327319:186A04FACA7626DD942BABAF7ADA66F6:r)

I can't wait to share my final decision with you next Monday and hope you'll stand with me in the next phase.

Thanks

\- Lindsey

| |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

**Next week's presidential announcement will be one of the biggest and most memorable moments of my life, and I need to know you stand with me.**

Friend, I hope you will please show your support by taking immediate action and making a secure online contribution below:

[**Chip in $25 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28047481:26946800489:m:1:877327319:186A04FACA7626DD942BABAF7ADA66F6:r)

[**Chip in $50 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28047482:26946800489:m:1:877327319:186A04FACA7626DD942BABAF7ADA66F6:r)

[**Chip in $100 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28047483:26946800489:m:1:877327319:186A04FACA7626DD942BABAF7ADA66F6:r)

[**Or follow this link to donate another amount >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28047480:26946800489:m:1:877327319:186A04FACA7626DD942BABAF7ADA66F6:r)

My announcement next Monday morning will begin a new chapter in my life. Only 5 days remain, and I hope I can continue to count on you.

Sincerely,

Senator Lindsey Graham

P.S. Time is running out. I hope you will stand with me today as I prepare to make my presidential announcement on Monday. Please show your support **[by making a contribution of $25, $50 $100, or whatever you can afford today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28047480:26946800489:m:1:877327319:186A04FACA7626DD942BABAF7ADA66F6:r)**. Thanks, Lindsey

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28047480:26946800489:m:1:877327319:186A04FACA7626DD942BABAF7ADA66F6:r) |

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: NSA spying on life support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

What a week!

It all culminated at 1:30 AM Saturday when the U.S. Senate attempted to ram through legislation to keep the NSA's illegal domestic spy programs alive.

The first vote was on the House passed "reform" bill, which still allows bulk data collection under another method.

It failed, leaving spy-state apologists only one option - _to ram through some type of short-term extension of the unconstitutional "PATRIOT" Act_.

Fellow Conservative, I stood up to the surveillance state every step of way.

I refused to back down - objecting to EVERY short-term extension attempt made last night.

As a result, the Senate was forced to adjourn WITHOUT reauthorizing the "PATRIOT" Act - meaning the beast is set to expire on May 31st.

**[Will you stand with me before the May 31st deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28049917:26948897545:m:1:879035888:574BCD846BCD68CC68C4EFA19B304708:r)**?

When the Senate comes back into session this Sunday, they'll have only 8 hours to pass a bill before the "PATRIOT" Act expires.

_That means if you and I can hold them off, we will take the first big step toward ending illegal NSA spying for good_.

But to do that I'm going to need your help throughout next week.

The truth is, this fight is extremely important to our future.

The Founders understood Liberty cannot long survive without privacy.

Most conservatives know government registration of firearms would ultimately lead to gun confiscation.

It's no different with the rest of our lives.

Once government bureaucrats know every aspect of our lives - what we watch, what we buy, what we eat, where we worship - it won't be long until they try to run them "for our own good."

_That's why it's critical you and I hold the spy state off for 8 more hours on May 31st_.

My staff is preparing a few videos of exactly what happened on the Senate floor.

As soon as they're uploaded and ready, I'll be sure to send them to you.

_Thanks to your support, you and I won a stunning victory this week. We proved if freedom-loving Americans stand and fight the Washington Machine - we can win_!

But I'm afraid our job is not over yet.

**[So I hope I can count on you to continue to stand with me in this fight](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28049917:26948897545:m:1:879035888:574BCD846BCD68CC68C4EFA19B304708:r)**.

| ****[** dpwillis67@gmail.com **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28049917:26948897545:m:1:879035888:574BCD846BCD68CC68C4EFA19B304708:r "http://randpaul.com/f/stop-nsa-spying-showdown-a?sr=rhf052815dta><span
style=")
**Signed Your Stop NSA Spying Petition?**
**## NO SIGNATURE ##******
---

| [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28049918:26948897545:m:1:879035888:574BCD846BCD68CC68C4EFA19B304708:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28049917:26948897545:m:1:879035888:574BCD846BCD68CC68C4EFA19B304708:r)

name: President George H.W. Bush
subject: I want you to win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc
body:
Friend,

When Jeb asked me to sign a photo of the two of us, I was all in. My only disappointment was we didn't have one of us skydiving...but the family photo of us on the tennis court is great.

Not many folks know that Jeb played tennis for the University of Texas Longhorns. Like all Bushes, he's competitive! Maybe I'll talk him into a parachute jump soon.

**[All you have to do to win one of of these great photos is chip in $3 now](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3758:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1).** And, our team will double all entrees that come in for the next 24 hours!

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3759:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Remember, for the next 24 hours, our team will double all entrees that come in, so don't miss out on this opportunity. Enter now: [**RighttoRisePAC.org/Signed-Photo/**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3760:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Good luck!

George H.W. Bush
41st President of the United States

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=3761:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
[ ](https://www.facebook.com/jebbush) [ ](https://twitter.com/jebbush)
Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.[www.RighttoRisePac.org](www.RighttoRisePac.org)
Right to Rise PO Box 14349 Tallahassee, FL 32317
[Unsubscribe](http://www.mail.righttorisepac.org/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=475&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=1)
[You can read the full sweepstakes rules here](https://righttorisepac.org/signed-photo-rules/). Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by [clicking here](https://righttorisepac.org/win-a-signed-photo/). **NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE.** No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, [click here](https://righttorisepac.org/signed-photo/). To enter without making a contribution, [click here](https://righttorisepac.org/win-a-signed-photo/). Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Tuesday, May 26, 2015 at 12:00 am Eastern Daylight Time and ends on Friday, June 5, 2015 at 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time on Friday, June 5, 2015. Three winners will receive the following Prize: one (1) framed, autographed photo of Jeb Bush and President George H.W. Bush with an approximate value of $100 each. Approximate total retail value is $300. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $300. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Details and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply. Restrictions are listed in the [Official Rules]( https://righttorisepac.org/signed-photo-rules/). The Sponsor is the Right to Rise PAC. The Sponsor's address is PO Box 14349 Tallahassee, FL 32317.

name: Rand 2016
subject: Will 13 more Patriots from 20112 stand in Rand's corner?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Real quick, Fellow Conservative --

Already, hundreds of thousands of Patriots have pledged to stand in Rand's corner as he slugs it out with Barack Obama and his spy-state apologists on Sunday over the NSA's illegal spying program.

But the entire Washington Machine, from the White House on down, have labeled Rand "Enemy #1" \-- and they're gunning for him with everything they've got.

Of course, Rand has drawn his line in the sand. And he's not backing down!

But Sunday's Senate showdown is fast approaching.

And Rand Paul needs 13 more Patriots from the 20112 area in his corner on Sunday to ensure every member of the U.S. Senate knows how their constituents feel about this critical issue.

When the bell rings Sunday, Rand needs you to be one of those Patriots, Fellow Conservative.

**[Click HERE to add your name and let Rand know you're with him on Sunday](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28058229:26957429481:m:1:879035888:F906E0861816EFC48883F88ACD89B9BE:r)**.

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: The stories I carry with me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Will you join me? | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI3MzA1MTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyNzUxMTUyS0&mt=1&rt=0) Friend --

Last week in Iowa, I met a young man named Brad who opened his first business when he was just 20 years old. Brad's town didn't have a single restaurant, so he bought an ice cream parlor and started serving sandwiches so the farmers in town could get lunch. Today, Brad's restaurant does $700,000 in business every year, and he has 30 employees.

I'm hearing stories like Brad's all over America: stories of American grit, entrepreneurship, and spirit -- stories that inspire me every single day.

**[I want to meet you and hear your story. Will you sign up before the deadline at midnight tonight to be automatically entered for a chance to win a trip to meet me?**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjI3MzA1MTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyNzUxMTUyS0&mt=2&rj=NTYyNzUxMTUyS0&rt=0) I wish I had time to talk with every single American, but we both know that's not feasible. That's why I'm so glad the campaign is running this contest to fly a supporter like you to our first campaign rally.

It’s not just that I enjoy talking with Americans -- stories like Brad’s help inform my understanding of serious policy issues. I want to carry your story with me. I want the experiences you’ve had in your life to help shape the decisions I’ll make in mine.**I truly hope to meet you at our first rally. Sign up before the midnight deadline to be automatically entered to win a free trip there:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/meet-hillary/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI3MzA1MTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyNzUxMTUyS0&mt=1&rt=0)** Thank you,

Hillary
**

Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. ****
</htmThe stories I carry with me
clean_body: Will you join me? | Friend -- Last week in Iowa, I met a young man named Brad who opened his first business when he was just 20 years old. Brad's town didn't have a single restaurant, so he bought an ice cream parlor and started serving sandwiches so the farmers in town could get lunch. Today, Brad's restaurant does $700,000 in business every year, and he has 30 employees. I'm hearing stories like Brad's all over America: stories of American grit, entrepreneurship, and spirit -- stories that inspire me every single day. I wish I had time to talk with every single American, but we both know that's not feasible. That's why I'm so glad the campaign is running this contest to fly a supporter like you to our first campaign rally. It’s not just that I enjoy talking with Americans -- stories like Brad’s help inform my understanding of serious policy issues. I want to carry your story with me. I want the experiences you’ve had in your life to help shape the decisions I’ll make in mine.I truly hope to meet you at our first rally. Sign up before the midnight deadline to be automatically entered to win a free trip there: Thank you, Hillary Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 5/11/15 and 5/28/15 or 5/29/15 and 6/5/15. Enter by contributing or click to enter without contributing. Two winners will receive a special invitation to a campaign event with Hillary Clinton, round trip tickets for winners to event from within the 50 U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico, two nights hotel accommodations (approx. retail value of all prizes $2000). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility. name: Sheila O'Connell, Chris Van Hollen for US Senate
subject: FW: protect our schools
body:
Friend,

I wanted to make sure you saw Chris's email about funding for Maryland's schools. Our students deserve a good education, and refusing to release millions of dollars in education funds is simply shortsighted and harmful to our schools.

**[Join Chris and add your name to show your support for Maryland's students. Let's take a stand against these reckless actions. >>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e49/70cdc2ba/478471f6/3940d14/1553414852/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-with-chris?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Join+Chris+and+add+your+name+to+show+you&utm_campaign=em052815&source=em052815")**

Thanks,

Sheila
> _\----Original Message----_ First, I cannot thank you enough for your support last week. Thousands of you stood up and signed our petition on the DISCLOSE Act. We will keep fighting until we end secret money and take back our democracy. But right now I also need your help on another vital issue. When I served in the Maryland General Assembly, I helped lead the fight to dramatically boost our investment in educating Maryland's students. That commitment helped launch Maryland schools to the top 3 in America. While we need to do even better, we must not go backwards. Unfortunately, a few days ago, Maryland's new Republican Governor refused to release $68 million in vital funding for our state's schools. Meanwhile, the Republican budget in Congress would slash federal funds for Maryland's schools, while providing windfall tax breaks to well-connected special interests. [**Please stand with me to support a good education for Maryland 's students. Add your name to stop these shortsighted and reckless actions. >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e49/70cdc2ba/478471f6/3940d26/1553414852/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-with-chris?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Please+stand+with+me+to+support+a+good+e&utm_campaign=em052815&source=em052815") As a father of three, I've seen firsthand the impact a good public Maryland education can have. [**Please add your name now in support. >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e49/70cdc2ba/478471f6/3940d3d/1553414852/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-with-chris?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Please+add+your+name+now+in+support+gtgt&utm_campaign=em052815&source=em052815") Thanks for standing with me, Chris
---

Paid for Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e49/70cdc2ba/478471f6/3940d32/1553414852/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em052815&source=em052815") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Tea Party values?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| The Tea Party's extreme politics are the reason I first ran for office. Friend -- **Did you see that? Marco Rubio recently said that marriage equality presents a "_real and present danger_."** That's just wrong. But it's what I've come to expect from the Tea Party. It's why I first ran for office. It's why Tea Party-affiliated super PACs are already attacking my campaign. And it's why this month's end-of-month deadline is more important than ever. **Will you pitch in today -- before our end-of-month deadline -- and make sure my campaign has the resources to fight back against the Tea Party?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ **[Chip in $5 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-may2015?express_lane=true&refcode=ema_2015-05-28_b1_pm_ldnd&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[Chip in $35 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. I'd rather rely on you. Thanks, Patrick Murphy | **[Contribute »](http://act.murphyforflorida. name: Rand Paul
subject: President Obama hopes I fail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

72 hours.

That's all that remains until Sunday's NSA spying showdown with President Obama.

His administration is slinging mud by singling me out as "enemy #1" for leading the fight to stop President Obama's lawless domestic spying.

**[I haven't heard back from you and I need to count on your support](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28063648:26964918024:m:1:879035888:D3FB54F192E5FCA345A32C4FAB7DFF86:r)**.

You see, when the Senate comes back into session they will have little time to pass a bill before the so-called "PATRIOT Act" expires.

With this time crunch it's crucial true patriots across America crank up the pressure on my colleagues to stop this abuse of our liberties.

Fellow Conservative, if you and I can hold them off we will have taken the first step toward ending illegal NSA spying.

And thanks to your support, you and I staged a stunning victory last week when - after I stood on the Senate floor and filibustered for 10.5 hours - our movement was able to stop the spy state apologists from ramming through a renewal of the so-called "PATRIOT Act" ahead of the Memorial Day recess.

_But that was just "round 1" of this fight_.

The big showdown is this Sunday and I need to know if you stand with me before the deadline. I'm just one senator.

The strength of our movement lies in the millions of Americans who live outside the beltway and demand their government abide by the Bill of Rights.

And right now my colleagues need to hear from as many of them as possible.

So I'm asking for your immediate help.

**[Please add your name to join fight against President Obama and illegal NSA spying right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28063648:26964918024:m:1:879035888:D3FB54F192E5FCA345A32C4FAB7DFF86:r)**.

After you add your name, **[please chip in a contribution of $10](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28063648:26964918024:m:1:879035888:D3FB54F192E5FCA345A32C4FAB7DFF86:r)** to help me reach the grassroots to turn up the pressure on their senators to stop illegal domestic spying.

Time is winding down.

As deadlines approach, anything can happen in Congress, so it's crucial you and I rally every American possible to contact their senators ahead of the big showdown with President Obama.

**[So please stand with me today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28063648:26964918024:m:1:879035888:D3FB54F192E5FCA345A32C4FAB7DFF86:r)**.

| ****[** dpwillis67@gmail.com **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28063648:26964918024:m:1:879035888:D3FB54F192E5FCA345A32C4FAB7DFF86:r "http://randpaul.com/f/stop-nsa-spying-showdown-a?sr=rhf052815c3")
**Signed Your Stop NSA Spying Petition?**
**## NO SIGNATURE ##******
---

| [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28063649:26964918024:m:1:879035888:D3FB54F192E5FCA345A32C4FAB7DFF86:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28063650:26964918024:m:1:879035888:D3FB54F192E5FCA345A32C4FAB7DFF86:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28063651:26964918024:m:1:879035888:D3FB54F192E5FCA345A32C4FAB7DFF86:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28063652:26964918024:m:1:879035888:D3FB54F192E5FCA345A32C4FAB7DFF86:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28063648:26964918024:m:1:879035888:D3FB54F192E5FCA345A32C4FAB7DFF86:r)
In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28063648:26964918024:m:1:879035888:D3FB54F192E5FCA345A32C4FAB7DFF86:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28063653:26964918024:m:1:879035888:D3FB54F192E5FCA345A32C4FAB7DFF86:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28063654:26964918024:m:1:879035888:D3FB54F192E5FCA345A32C4FAB7DFF86:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28063655:26964918024:m:1:879035888:D3FB54F192E5FCA345A32C4FAB7DFF86:r)

name: Hillary for America
subject: Midnight deadline to meet Hillary!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Enter before midnight to meet Hillary! | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjI3MzQ0ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyNzgzNTA2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 5/11/15 and 5/28/15 or 5/29/15 and 6/5/15. Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201.
